overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player moves from an open sunlit plaza through a covered market walkway, along a street with massive digital billboards, and into a pedestrian plaza with food stalls. The environment features neon signage, palm trees, and high-rise buildings with a vivid cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with palm trees and skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward the covered market entrance

entered.detail: tall building with large 03 signage near the top
tropical palm trees lining the plaza walkway
large overhead structure marking the market entrance
multiple holographic advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit commercial plaza with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers. The camera moves forward toward a covered market entrance while pedestrians walk in various directions. Large digital billboards and the distinctive 03 building dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food vendors and digital signage

events.description: entering covered market area from open plaza, lighting shifts to mixed artificial and natural

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market past food stalls and seated customers

notable_agents.action: seated at food stall table eating and conversing

entered.detail: large suspended digital screens displaying advertisements overhead
round tables with stools where customers are eating
red and black automated vending machines against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered market walkway where the environment becomes shaded and enclosed. Overhead digital billboards replace the open sky, and food stalls with seating areas line the right side. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial neon and filtered daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with large building-mounted digital billboards

events.description: exiting covered market onto open street with bright sunlight and large building advertisements
passing parked vehicles along the curb while walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past large building advertisements and street furniture

entered.detail: massive building facade covered with multiple digital advertisements including Real Water and Pizza Mushi

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market, the scene opens onto a city street bathed in bright sunlight. A massive building on the left displays enormous digital billboards for various products. The camera walks along the sidewalk past parked cars and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with benches trees and central food structure

events.description: turning left from street into open plaza area with central food structure

agents.ego_description: turning into the plaza and walking toward the central food structure with benches

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench looking at phone

entered.detail: distinctive canopy structure with golden supports housing food vendors
concrete seating areas with people resting
mature trees providing shade in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a spacious pedestrian plaza featuring a central food structure with a distinctive golden canopy. Benches and trees dot the area while a few pedestrians stroll or sit. The environment is open and sunlit with commercial buildings surrounding the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter with neon signage and vendor

events.description: slowing down and approaching the food counter to interact with vendor

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall counter where a vendor is working behind the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor behind counter wearing red cap and blue shirt preparing food

entered.detail: service counter with illuminated menu and food preparation area
large pink neon sign reading WATSON'S above the counter
green illuminated vending machine to the left of the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a specific food stall counter beneath a pink neon sign. The area is semi-covered with mixed lighting. A vendor stands behind the counter as the camera slows down, ending the approach at the service area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open commercial plaza through a shaded market corridor and back into the sunlit city streets. It begins in a wide plaza surrounded by palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers, moving forward past pedestrians toward a covered entrance. As the camera enters the market walkway, the open sky is replaced by an enclosed ceiling of digital billboards and artificial neon lighting that illuminates rows of food stalls. The scene then opens back into the brilliant daylight as the camera exits the corridor, shifting toward a wide sidewalk lined with parked cars. Finally, the view expands to reveal a massive building on the left dominated by enormous, glowing digital advertisements.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit urban plaza into the intimate, neon-lit interior of a food stall. It begins by turning left into a spacious pedestrian area characterized by a central golden canopy, scattered benches, and strolling pedestrians under a bright sky. As the camera moves forward, the open sunlight gradually gives way to a semi-covered environment with mixed lighting. The scene then shifts focus toward a specific service counter beneath a glowing pink neon sign, slowing its pace as it approaches the vendor. The movement finally concludes at the stall's counter, transitioning from the scale of the city plaza to a close-up commercial interaction.
